top_signals.title: Indonesia Stocks Tumble to Five-Year Low, Rupiah Drops to Record
top_signals.summary: Indonesian stocks slumped to their lowest level in five years while the rupiah reached another record low, underscoring investor concern that persistently high oil prices are straining the country’s finances.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Stocks Extend Record Rally on AI, Crude Oil Climbs: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Global equities advanced to new highs as demand for artificial-intelligence stocks intensified, cementing the sector’s role as the market’s main driver.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Portugal carries hot streak and baggage into Ronaldo’s sixth World Cup
top_signals.summary: The tournament in Canada, Mexico and the United States is expected to be Ronaldo's record-breaking sixth World Cup, an astonishing feat for a 41-year-old.
